Background.occupation: Delivery driver for a major logistics company
Background.key_experience: Moved to a mid-sized city at age 22 for job opportunities, lives alone in a rented apartment, has a stable but monotonous routine with minimal career advancement

Cognition.core_value: Stability and social harmony; prefers to avoid conflict and maintain predictable routines
Cognition.bias: Confirmation bias and bandwagon effect; tends to adopt popular opinions from social media and online forums without critical evaluation

Current_State.recent_memory: Watched several viral TikTok videos about minimalist living and started considering downsizing possessions, though hasn't acted on it
Current_State.emotion: Mildly anxious but generally neutral; feels a vague sense of FOMO (fear of missing out) from seeing peers' curated online lives
